results.title: TikToker Alleges NYC Subletter Without Proof of Income Blamed ‘Slummy’ Landlord After Learning She Had to Move Out
results.description: A TikTok creator is drawing attention to what she describes as a dispute over a New York City apartment and a subletter’s GoFundMe campaign. The woman, who goes by Kaylen or @kaylendoesstuff on TikTok, posted a video breaking down the NYC roommate drama that has captivated viewers and gotten people pretty involved, whether by commenting,... Sign up to receive the Daily Dot’s Internet Insider newsletter for urgent news from the frontline of online. The post TikToker Alleges NYC Subletter Without Proof of Income Blamed ‘Slummy’ Landlord After Learning She Had to Move Out appeared first on The Daily Dot .
